ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Closing price of the previous day */,
  "50d_avg" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "200d_avg" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for stocks */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio for stocks */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share for stocks */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the volatility of the instrument relative to the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Reference to the market sector the instrument belongs to */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the instrument belongs to */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number for the instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) number for the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the market sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., retail investor, institutional investor, financial analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument analyzed in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume threshold) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address for sending notifications */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings report, economic indicator release) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
